fieldguide.block.minecraft.cocoa.descrip:
Brown pods that grow on Jungle logs and produce cocoa.

Imbue a Lost Soul into it for a tameable farming companion!
fieldguide.block.minecraft.beetroots.des:
Red root vegetables that can be eaten or turned into soup.

Imbue a Lost Soul into it for a tameable farming companion!
fieldguide.block.minecraft.melon.descrip:
A block that can be broken into Melon Slices, which can be eaten.

Imbue a Lost Soul into it for a tameable farming companion!
fieldguide.block.minecraft.wheat.descrip:
An item that can be used for crafting or used to tempt Cows and Sheep.

Imbue a Lost Soul into it for a tameable farming companion!
fieldguide.block.minecraft.nether_wart.d:
A Nether crop that can be planted on Soul Sand. It's useful as a brewing ingredient.

Imbue a Lost Soul into it for a tameable, explosive farming companion!
fieldguide.block.minecraft.pitcher_plant:
An ancient, sweet-smelling plant.

Imbue a Lost Soul into it for a tameable farming companion!
fieldguide.block.minecraft.carrots.descr:
Root vegetable that can be eaten raw or combined with gold.

Imbue a Lost Soul into it for a tameable farming companion!
fieldguide.block.minecraft.pumpkin.descr:
A block that can be carved with shears, or crafted into a pie.

Imbue a Lost Soul into it for a tameable farming companion!
fieldguide.block.minecraft.potatoes.desc:
Root vegetables that can be cooked or eaten raw.

Imbue a Lost Soul into it for a tameable farming companion!

...might be poisonous.
fieldguide.block.minecraft.torchflower.d:
An ancient flower that can be crafted into Orange Dye or placed in a Flower Pot.

Imbue a Lost Soul into it for a tameable adventuring companion!
